Eureka Lite Surface

Static seed surface. No JavaScript, no live search, no live source probes, no downloads.

Lite Overview Sources Evals Demo Queries Limitations

This is Eureka's lite static surface for old and low-capability browsers. It is a set of fixed pages generated from public data summaries.

  • Lite source summary
  • Lite eval summary
  • Lite demo query list
  • Lite limitations
  • Plain text surface
  • Static files surface
  • Static resolver demos

Compatibility Surface Strategy v0 governs these projections as static views of the same resolver truth. Signed Snapshot Format v0 adds a repo seed example only. Relay Surface Design v0 records future local/LAN relay policy only. Neither milestone publishes a public /snapshots/ route, production signed snapshots, relay runtime, native clients, live API behavior, or runtime product behavior.

Current static status

  • Source records summarized: 9
  • Archive hard eval tasks: 6
  • Search audit queries: 64
  • Public-alpha routes summarized: 94
  • Future live backend endpoints reserved: 11
  • Future live probe candidates disabled: 9

The reserved /api/v1 route family is not live in this static artifact.

Live Probe Gateway Contract v0 is policy only; no live probes or network calls are implemented.

Machine-readable summaries: site, sources, evals, routes.

Eureka is a Python reference backend prototype, not production. This surface uses no scraping, performs no live source probes, and makes no external search calls. external baselines pending/manual; source placeholders remain placeholders.
